title: solanum carolinense var. hirsutum
intro: Solanum carolinense var. hirsutum, also known as hairy Carolina horsenettle, is a perennial plant belonging to the Solanum genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of solanine and other glycoalkaloids. The health benefits of Solanum carolinense var. hirsutum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Solanum carolinense var. hirsutum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
